hypothesis: Exact expected value of sample information ranks informative probes better than current-error-only heuristics, while irreducible noise and misspecification expose their failure regimes.

gates.learnable_mutual_information_rho_ge_0_7: Spearman rho between probe mutual information and exact oracle EVSI is at least 0.7 in the learnable scenario.
gates.learnable_oracle_signal_top: The exact signal probe is the unique oracle-EVSI winner in the learnable scenario.
gates.irreducible_oracle_evsi_zero: All irreducible-noise oracle EVSI values are within 1e-12 of zero despite current error being at least 0.3.
gates.misspecification_preserves_failure: Under model misspecification, mutual-information and oracle-EVSI winners differ, while true expected-regret reduction selects the robust weak signal.

compute.sampling: exact enumeration of two latent states and two probe outcomes
